tetherAnchor.anchorText: Applicants must submit documentation within 30 days.
tetherAnchor.structuredValue: Applicants are required to submit documentation within 30 days.
tetherAnchor.traceReason: Includes a requirement ('must'). Includes a time constraint.

tetherAnchor.anchorText: The agency may extend deadlines under exceptional circumstances.
tetherAnchor.structuredValue: The agency is allowed to extend deadlines under exceptional circumstances.
